meta.description: Primary slim resume of Prasad Gade for agent consumption

basics.name: Prasad Gade
basics.label: Data Scientist & Computer Engineer
basics.summary: Data Scientist and Computer Engineer from Mumbai, India. B.Tech student at Sardar Patel Institute of Technology (CGPA 9.26/10). Builds data pipelines, ML models, and interactive web applications.

education.institution: Bhartiya Vidya Bhavan's Sardar Patel Institute of Technology
education.minor: Management from SPJIMR (S. P. Jain Institute of Management & Research)

highlights: Learned Data Analysis and Business Intelligence using Power BI
Delivered a sales dashboard for North Wind Traders, improving data visibility by 70%

projects.name: IPL Analytics Platform
highlights: Processed 278,205 ball-by-ball records across 18 IPL seasons
Built 14 dashboard pages with a custom SQL query builder and validated aggregates

projects.name: UPI Analytics Platform
highlights: Processed 9,026 JSON files across 788 districts and 42 months
Delivered 68 visualizations across Streamlit and Power BI dashboards

projects.name: Lex Simulacra
highlights: Built an 8-agent legal simulation with 99% citation accuracy
Reduced legal research time by 75% across 100K+ documents

projects.name: Intrusion Detection
highlights: Benchmarked 6 ML/DL models on an 8.6M-sample dataset
Achieved 99.99% recall and 100% precision

projects.name: KindHearts
highlights: Built the platform that won 1st place at Tech Horizon National Hackathon
Improved donation workflow speed and transparency with real-time tracking

projects.name: Celestial Classifier
highlights: Achieved 99.07% accuracy classifying 10,000 celestial objects
Benchmarked 4 classifiers with tuned neural-network performance

projects.name: NutriSnap
highlights: Used Gemini API for image and manual nutrition tracking
Implemented dashboard-based calorie and macro tracking

projects.name: Audio Visualizer
highlights: Built a client-side music visualizer with multiple display modes
Deployed it as a live GitHub Pages app

projects.name: Attendance Tracker
highlights: Built attendance reports, analysis views, and editable records
Added offline-first storage with import and export support

projects.name: Habit Tracker
highlights: Created streaks, calendar views, analytics, and contribution-style charts
Kept the app privacy-first with offline local storage

projects.name: Portfolio
highlights: Built a multi-theme interactive portfolio with a Minecraft skin viewer
Added paper physics, hidden easter eggs, and agent-readable static APIs

certifications.name: Introduction to Cloud Computing on AWS

achievements.title: Winner — Tech Horizon National Hackathon
achievements.description: Secured 1st place out of 80+ national teams in a 36-hour hackathon by designing the KindHearts donation platform.
